rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test (M2+)
50% magic rule (M3-M8)
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cross-module magic-distribution rule; not judged on a single exercise file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Trust the agentic design — no human backstops
Quality ladder
One exercise = one bounded activity
Modules composable across variants
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Library-composition / VARIANT-marker rule; cross-file concern, not visible in one exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Three-level completeness
Pattern-recognition LOs need n>=2 instances with contrast
Progression-with-variations is the spine
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cross-module same-move-different-face check; not decidable from one exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Student agency — adults decide
Delegation — student brings, Claude screens
Split mega-exercise when phases = distinct skills + distinct artifacts
Artifact-realism check
Teach principle + technique — default
Auto-fire sim+eval after significant rewrite
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Process rule for the generation cycle, not a property of the file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go; live in prompts not body
Corporate infra = nice-to-have, never forcing function
Personal-first, team promotion via human conversation
Measure silent failure, not just friction
Don't pre-set categories before experiment runs
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Evaluation-process rule (drafting categories from cohort data); not a property of the exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification layers sample DIFFERENT error distributions
Cheap-before-expensive verification ordering
Rule in memory without forcing function = worse than no rule
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Memory-authoring / forcing-function-location process rule; not a property of the student-facing body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Short skeptical pushback on done = re-verify trigger
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Author/agent behavior on done-signals; not a property of the curriculum body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cohort execution is trainer-paced + concurrent
Host-skill optional; maintainer blocks trainer-only
Reflection beats: in-chat over file-write
Classroom = default delivery; body teaches work, trainer manages room
Eval = fixed yardstick; thing measured learns
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Loop-architecture rule (scorer fixity across rounds); the eval-loop module owns this, not this single-pass build exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reading burden for verification = banned; Claude audits Claude
Self-report + self-audit charity — verify at artifact
Offered structures need forced-engagement mechanic
Source-type blindness on ingestion
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Heterogeneous-source ingestion / slide-format extraction rule; no source-folder ingestion in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Task selection drives outcome — name floor AND ceiling
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Task-sizing floor/ceiling callout belongs to the M4 send-off exercise that picks the task; M5 re-uses the already-chosen M4 task.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer-block hedge naming section's own failure mode = cut-signal
Audience tier determines authoring substrate
Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust
Context-loading tiers as staged progression
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Auto/lazy/explicit context-tier reveal sequence; this exercise teaches verifier/reference/plan.md, not the context-loading tiers.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Removals are strategic — ask before cutting
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-process rule (pause before cutting entities); not a property of the file body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Symmetric visible-mechanics > runtime fork (Agents 101-class)
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Dual-runtime fork-vs-symmetric decision is Agents 101-class (Cowork present); AE101 is CLI+Desktop, no Cowork fork in this body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Load-bearing platform feature = no fallback. Gate or redesign
Eval architecture — partition by evidence source
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Judge/sim-trace architecture rule for the eval system, not the student-facing exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Plug points + UX
Per-exercise leap test — 3 observable Monday outcomes
Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch
Heavy fan-out prompts get body recovery callout
Save belongs with authoring, not loading
Convenience-driven prompts with known shape-bias — body acknowledgment callout
Deliberate-antipattern prompts = class-judge exempt, flagged-by-design
Session widget shape; place by learning flow
Widgets carry semantics, not just emphasis
Pre-action framing doesn't preview prompt's payoff
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout
Multi-session ships as packaging, not new primitive
/clear = tool, not ceremony
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: In-module close-protocol /clear discipline; this exercise's close hands off to the module Debrief in the same session, no /clear beat authored.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Inbound links preserve pedagogical beat across reference restructuring
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Reference-page restructuring / inbound-link audit rule; no reference page is being restructured here.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Scan at the unit the rule names, not convenient larger one
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Auditor-discipline meta-rule about scan granularity; governs how this judge scans, not the file content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify mechanism before proposing surgery
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Process rule for proposing SKILL.md/tool changes; not a property of the exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Callouts next to prompts: steer, don't pre-empt
rules_evaluated.evidence: 87: "**Watch for slowness.** Two files rewritten between every grill turn is the slowness pattern. The prompt above locks both files until you say *lock it in.* If the agent touches either file mid-grill anyway, push back."
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Callout names one specific failure mode (mid-grill file rewrites) the prompt's lock instruction already prevents — pre-emption shape that rots if the prompt mechanics change; prefer a generalising steer (notice slow turns -> ask Claude why -> relax) over the single named cause.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Persistent TODO surfaces stale by default — audit before acting
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Punchlist-staleness discipline before acting on long-lived TODOs; not a property of this exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer blocks point, don't restate
